name: birdhouse
description: Birdhouse Playground - Theme exploration for LLM chat coding apps

scripts.test: bun run test:frontend && bun run test:server && bun run test:plugin
scripts.check:all: bun run check:frontend && bun run check:server && bun run check:plugin
scripts.build: bun run build:frontend && bun run build:server
scripts.build-and-install: bun run build:cli && bun run install:cli
